# Owner Approval Request

Status: repo-local template only.
Evidence status: [NOT EVIDENCE / NOT RECORDED].
Deployment status: [DEPLOYMENT APPROVAL: NOT GRANTED].

## Warnings

- Do not tick approval boxes unless actual owner approval has been provided.
- Local tests passing does not equal approval.
- Merged PRs do not equal approval.
- This template does not deploy anything.
- Preview/provider/deployment approval must be explicit and scoped.
- Keep every placeholder blank until a real owner response exists in the approved evidence capture location.

## Required fields

- Requested decision: [REQUESTED DECISION PLACEHOLDER]
- Scope of approval: [SCOPE OF APPROVAL PLACEHOLDER]
- Target environment placeholder: [TARGET ENVIRONMENT PLACEHOLDER]
- Provider/environment owner placeholder: [PROVIDER/ENVIRONMENT OWNER PLACEHOLDER]
- Rollback owner placeholder: [ROLLBACK OWNER PLACEHOLDER]
- Evidence capture location placeholder: [EVIDENCE CAPTURE LOCATION PLACEHOLDER]
- Stop/rollback condition placeholder: [STOP/ROLLBACK CONDITION PLACEHOLDER]
- Explicit owner response placeholder: [EXPLICIT OWNER RESPONSE PLACEHOLDER]

## Approval checklist

Do not tick these boxes unless actual owner approval has been provided for the exact scoped item.

- [ ] Deployment approval: [OWNER RESPONSE PLACEHOLDER]

## Scope boundaries
